Name: Burn
Description: Deals 1 damage to the unit at end of turn.
Notes: Multiple applications currently collapse back to one remaining Burn entry after ticking.

Name: Cannot Move
Description: Unit cannot move while the effect lasts.
Notes: Used by Trip, Snare, and bear traps.

Name: Stunned
Description: Unit cannot act while the effect lasts.
Notes: Applied by Bash, Petrify, and Stomp.

Name: Slow
Description: Unit movement is limited to 1 tile total per turn.
Notes: Also used as a card keyword on some roguelike attacks.

Name: Chilled
Notes: If a unit is both Chilled and Slowed it also becomes Frozen.

Name: Spell Resistance
Description: Spell damage to this unit is halved, rounded down.
Notes: Base leader modifier and also used by Necromancer.

Name: Reinforcement Penalty
Description: Strength gains from reinforcement effects are halved, rounded down.
Notes: Base leader modifier and also used by Necromancer.

Name: Regeneration
Description: Heals 1 strength at end of turn per stack.
Notes: Present in engine support and tests.

Name: Disarmed
Description: Reduces damage dealt by 1 per stack.

Name: Vulnerable
Description: Increases damage taken by 1 per stack.
Notes: Applied by Bleed and Rage; stacks.

Name: Strong
Description: Increases damage dealt by 1 per stack.
Notes: Stacks; Commander aura also grants an indefinite Strong source.

Name: Undying
Description: Prevents damage and ignores incoming debuffs while active.
Notes: Used by Shrug Off and Berserk.

Name: Spikes
Description: Reflects 1 damage to the attacker when this unit takes damage.

Name: Berserk
Description: Unit is destroyed at the end of the turn.
Notes: Usually paired with Strong and Undying for the same turn.

Name: Scalding
Description: Attack damage from this unit also applies Burn.
Notes: Encounter-only modifier used by Fire Spirits.

Name: Lightning Barrier
Description: Deals 1 damage to each adjacent enemy at end of turn.
Notes: Encounter-only on Lightning Spirits and granted by the Lightning Barrier card.
